description: A designed graphic on a light textured background. A red 'WANTED' banner sits at the upper left over a booking-style portrait of a man with short dark hair in a dark top. A red caption bar across the lower portrait reads 'CSAM PRODUCTION'. An ICE logo and a red footer bar reading 'SEND TIPS to 866-DHS-2-ICE' are at the bottom.
notable_text: WANTED; CSAM PRODUCTION; ICE; SEND TIPS to 866-DHS-2-ICE
